title: Horizon Cobblemon Items
description: Various different Cobblemon related items for the Horizon modpack
body:
![Horizon Cobblemon Items](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_ff03fe66-1edb-4bbd-92b0-c0a2b92b062c.png)

(Also Available on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/horizon-cobblemon-items))

Horizon Cobblemon Items is a Cobblemon addon mod for the [Horizon](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/horizon-new-dawn) modpack. All of the items in this mod are UNOBTAINABLE in survival and are meant to be made obtainable or distributed by modpack devs and server owners.

---

## All Items

### Bottle Caps

- Golden Bottle Cap: Sets all of the Pokémon's effective IV stats to 31
- Void Bottle Cap: Resets all of the Pokémon's effective IV stats to 0
- Wooden Bottle Cap: Randomizes all of the Pokémon's effective IV stats
- Silver Bottle Caps: Sets one of the Pokémon's effective IV stat to 31
- Obsidian Bottle Cap: Resets one of the Pokémon's effective IV stat to 0

![Bottle Caps](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1445681/description_e6e4846c-31d5-47e1-b346-91064b4d5254.png)

### Carats

- Prismatic Carat: Transforms a Pokémon's effective IV stats into their actual IV stats
- Carats: Comes in yellow, red, blue, pink, green and cyan. Transforms the respective effective IV stat of the Pokémon into their actual IV HP stat

![Carats](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1445681/description_bdc9f0fc-87d9-47bb-b7a3-a88250e5d734.png)

### Berries

- Axiom Berry: Resets all of the Pokémon's EVs to 0
- Distorted Berries: Available as Pomeg, Kelpsy, Qualot, Hondew, Grepa and Tamato Berry. Resets the respective EV stat of the Pokémon to 0

![Berries](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1445681/description_c598bec6-8e42-464f-8001-3c5963275a48.png)

### Feathers

- Shadow Feathers: Lowers one of the Pokémon's EVs by one
- Phoenix Feathers: Sets one of the Pokémon's EVs to the max

![Feathers](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1445681/description_36f6d71e-a3bf-4e36-864e-a0b00db2339e.png)

### Candies

- Common Candy: Resets a Pokémon's level to 0
- Uncommon Candy: Lowers a Pokémon's level by one
- Ultra Rare Candy: Increases a Pokémon's level to the max

![Candies](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1445681/description_81850570-061d-4c99-83f3-62f0d426b9ee.png)

### Mac and Cheese

- Ultimate Mac and Cheese: Sets all of the Pokémon's riding stat to the max
- Mac and Cheese: Comes in Spicy, Dry, Sweet, Sour and Bitter, which all set the respective riding stat of the Pokémon to the max

![Mac and Cheese](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1445681/description_9e6788d4-e455-4c7f-9017-cb35049e5991.png)

### Hidden Machines

- Omnipotent Hidden Machine: Teaches the Pokémon all of their moves (that aren't learned through level ups)
- Hidden Machine: Comes in TM, Egg, Tutor, Legacy and Special. Teaches the respective moves to the Pokémon

![Hidden Machines](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1445681/description_955d62ae-eb2c-4fcd-b041-8c883fbc7f1c.png)

### Treats

- Poké Treat: Maxes a Pokémon's friendship
- Stale Poké Treat: Resets a Pokémon's friendship to 0

![Poké Treats](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1445681/description_7e3c11ac-20cd-4ba5-b9ef-9a32fae714e7.png)

### Other

- Baskét Ball: Turns the Pokémon into a shiny Pokémon
- Devolution Spray: Devolves a Pokémon into their previous evolution
- Gender Change Potion: Changes the Pokémon's gender
- Magic 8 Ball: Swaps the Pokémon's current ball to the ball in the player's offhand
- Black Hole Ponigiri: Resets a Pokémon's fullness to 0
- Poryphone: Converts a Pokémon model item into an actual Pokémon entity
- Dawn Ball: Basically the `/pokegiveother` command as an item. To get a Dawn Ball with a Pokémon, you can use the `/givedawnball <Pokémon Properties>` command

![Other](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1445681/description_f71b8a7b-551b-43b5-bfe7-accbe6c272bd.png)

---

## Mod Compatibility

Since this mod is inspired by [Cobblemon Utility+](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-utility+), this mod converts the items of Cobblemon Utility's to their respective Horizon item, if you had the mod installed and have replaced it with Horizon Cobblemon Items.
